description: Agent-readable index of MCP servers. Static JSON, no auth, daily refresh. Each endpoint answers one question; agents should fetch the relevant shard rather than the full index.json.

endpoints.name: by_capability
endpoints.description: Servers tagged with the given capability, ranked by composite score.

endpoints.name: by_kind
endpoints.description: Filter by classifier verdict; default catalog views show kind=server.

endpoints.name: top
endpoints.description: Three rankings: by composite, by stars, by recency. Top 25 each.

endpoints.name: vet
endpoints.description: Trust-focused subset: composite, axes, license, hard flags, plus a derived verdict (verified / caution / low_quality).

endpoints.name: alternatives
endpoints.description: Servers with overlapping capabilities, ranked by Jaccard similarity then composite. Up to 10.

endpoints.name: server_detail
endpoints.description: Full lint output for one server: every signal, every reason, every flag.

endpoints.name: index
endpoints.description: The full catalog as one document. Use shards for targeted queries.

endpoints.name: excluded
endpoints.description: Repos rejected by prefilter, with reason. Transparency.

mcp_tools.name: find_server
mcp_tools.description: Find MCP servers tagged with a controlled capability category. Use when your need maps to one of the 12 categories; if not, use 'search'.

mcp_tools.name: search
mcp_tools.description: Free-text search when 'find_server' enum doesn't fit. Matches repo name + description + capabilities, ranked by relevance × quality.

mcp_tools.name: vet
mcp_tools.description: Trust-focused summary of one server: composite, axes, license, hard flags, verdict.

mcp_tools.name: alternatives
mcp_tools.description: Capability-similar servers to a given one, for fallback or comparison.

mcp_tools.name: by_kind
mcp_tools.description: List servers (or clients / frameworks / tools) by classifier kind.

mcp_tools.name: top
mcp_tools.description: Top servers by composite score, stars, or recency.

mcp_tools.name: server_detail
mcp_tools.description: Full lint output for one server: every signal pass/fail with reason.
